articles.title: Northeastern University president’s compensation exceeds $3 million, records show
articles.description:
Joseph Aoun, president of Northeastern University, is the highest-paid college leader in Massachusetts by a wide margin.

The post Northeastern University president’s compensation exceeds $3 million, records show appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Northeastern University president Joseph Aoun's compensation exceeds $3 million annually.
Aoun is the highest-paid college leader in Massachusetts, surpassing peers significantly.
This salary may influence tuition rates and funding decisions for Boston students.
